hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) (Bandit.measure alg ν)

  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω a) (fun ω ↦ ω b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]
    exact (Measure.iIndepFun_infinitePi _).indepFun hab
  have h_map : (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ ω.2) = Bandit.streamMeasure ν := by
    rw [← Bandit.snd_measure, Measure.snd]
  rw [IndepFun, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop),
    Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), h_map]
  exact h_indep.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

rw [IndepFun_iff_indep]
  have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_iIndep] at h
  have hS : Pairwise (Disjoint on fun x ↦ {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = x}) := by
    intro x y hxy
    simp only [Function.onFun, Set.disjoint_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.subset_empty_iff,
      Set.mem_inter_iff, and_imp, Prod.forall]
    intro _ _ hx hy
    subst hx hy
    exact hxy rfl
  have := iIndep_iSup hS h
  refine (this hab).comp ?_ ?_
  · rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_pi]
    exact iSup_le_iSup fun n ↦ le_iSup_of_le (a, n) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl)
  · rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_pi]
    exact iSup_le_iSup fun n ↦ le_iSup_of_le (b, n) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl)
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop
